name: career-academy
description: this is a website for my client success point

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/assets/css dist/assets/js dist/assets/images && cp index.html dist/ && cp src/js/script.js dist/assets/js/ && cp src/assets/*.jpeg dist/assets/images/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/assets/*.png dist/assets/images/ 2>/dev/null || true && tailwindcss -i ./src/assets/css/main.css -o ./dist/assets/css/styles.css --minify
